allow: PowerShell($file = "C:\\Users\\Lenovo\\.claude\\projects\\d--Dev-preproute-assessment\\870c7937-b817-49bb-85d3-20c4f3262ef9.jsonl"; $lines = Get-Content $file; $lines[-5..-1] | ForEach-Object { $_ | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty message | Select-Object -ExpandProperty content | ForEach-Object { if \($_.type -eq "text"\) { $_.text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $_.text.Length\)\) } } } 2>&1)
